title: Calendar Heatmap Studio
description: Paint a GitHub-style contribution calendar by hand, import your own data, and export it as PNG, JSON, or a share link.
concept: A year-at-a-glance activity heatmap builder. Click or drag to paint intensity levels onto any day, switch between five palettes (or pick a custom hue), and page through multiple years. Streaks, active-day counts, and busiest-weekday stats update live.
features: Click-to-paint / drag-to-paint calendar grid with 5 intensity levels
Import your own CSV or JSON activity data, with automatic quartile bucketing
5 built-in palettes plus a custom color picker that generates its own shade ramp
Multi-year navigation with per-year and all-time streak statistics
Keyboard navigation (arrow keys + Enter, digit keys for brush level)
Export as PNG, JSON, or a shareable URL that reconstructs the exact grid

interaction.mouse: Click a day to paint it with the selected brush level; drag with the mouse held down to paint many days at once
interaction.click: Click a swatch to change brush intensity; click year arrows to change year
interaction.touch: Tap a day to paint it; swipe the grid horizontally to scroll through the year
interaction.keyboard: Arrow keys move the selection, Enter/Space paints, digit keys 0-4 set brush level, [ and ] change year
